data.title: E-Absen
data.description: A web-based attendance system utilizing QR codes to streamline check-in and improve attendance tracking efficiency.

data.title: LPMO
data.description: A web-based public complaint management system designed to facilitate reporting, tracking, and handling of community issues.

data.title: Weather App
data.description: A Chrome extension that enables users to quickly check weather conditions by city or country through a simple interface.

data.title: Bot Telegram Downloader
data.description: A Telegram bot that allows users to download videos from Instagram and TikTok by simply providing the URL.

data.title: Simple Calculator
data.description: A lightweight calculator application built as a Chrome extension with a simple and user-friendly interface.
